entry.title: RES25-197 (Honolulu): INTRO → FILE
entry.content:
URGING THE CITY ADMINISTRATION TO FORMALLY PETITION THE UNITED STATES ENVIRONMENTAL PROTECTION AGENCY TO AMEND THE CONSENT DECREE IN CIVIL NO. 94-00765 DAE-KSC IN THE U.S. DISTRICT COURT OF THE DISTRICT OF HAWAIʻI THROUGH AN INTEGRATED PLANNING FRAMEWORK.

Status: INTRO → FILE

Latest action: Filed pursuant to ROH SEC 1-2.5 which sets a one-year filing period on pending resolutions.

View on the council site
